name: Atombit
blog_profile: Atombit operates through specialized sub-brands (Profusion for data analytics, Amplify Analytix for experience intelligence) with a strong AI/ML-driven approach to customer data platforms and predictive CX. Their methodology centers on data science-led experience transformation, particularly for financial services organizations in EU and India markets. Delivery model combines proprietary analytics platforms with consulting services, positioning as a data-first CX partner rather than a survey/feedback platform integrator.

name: Sovanta
blog_profile: Sovanta positions as the premier bridge between SAP operational data and Qualtrics experience data within the DACH enterprise market. Their methodology focuses on embedded analytics that bring XM insights directly into SAP workflows, reducing time-to-action for frontline employees. AI stance centers on SAP BTP-native AI agents that automate experience-driven operational decisions. Delivery model is deeply technical SAP integration consulting with Qualtrics overlay, targeting large manufacturing, automotive, and financial services enterprises in Germany, Austria, and Switzerland.

name: New Metrics
blog_profile: New Metrics is the dominant Qualtrics partner in the GCC region, specializing in government and public sector citizen experience transformation. Their methodology emphasizes national-level CX maturity frameworks aligned with sovereign digital transformation agendas (Vision 2030, UAE Smart Government). AI approach focuses on Arabic-language NLP sentiment analysis and citizen journey analytics. Delivery model combines strategic CX consulting with Qualtrics platform implementation, primarily serving government ministries, semi-government entities, and regulated industries across Saudi Arabia, UAE, and broader MENA.

name: Ipsos CX
blog_profile: Ipsos CX leverages its global research infrastructure to deliver CX measurement, benchmarking, and strategic advisory services at enterprise scale. Their methodology is rooted in research science—combining behavioral economics, statistical modeling, and large-scale survey design to drive CX measurement rigor. AI approach integrates predictive analytics and text analytics within their proprietary Forces of CX framework. Delivery model pairs Medallia platform implementation with research-grade analytics consulting, targeting Fortune 500 clients across financial services, retail, telecom, and automotive sectors globally.

name: commonFont
blog_profile: commonFont positions as a specialized Qualtrics implementation and strategy partner with deep expertise in financial services CX programs. Their methodology centers on experience orchestration—connecting Qualtrics feedback loops with operational systems to drive real-time action. AI stance is heavily aligned with Qualtrics AI product roadmap, particularly around AI-powered text analytics, predictive churn modeling, and automated experience workflows. Delivery model combines Qualtrics technical implementation with strategic CX consulting, primarily serving US-based banking, insurance, and financial services enterprises.

name: Higher Oak
blog_profile: Higher Oak is a UK-based Qualtrics Platinum Partner specializing in enterprise XM program design and implementation across the UK and European markets. Their historical methodology has focused on employee experience and customer experience program architecture within regulated industries. Delivery model combines Qualtrics platform technical services with strategic advisory. The extended content silence may indicate internal restructuring, pivot in go-to-market strategy, or resource constraints.

name: Lukkap
blog_profile: Lukkap is a Spain-based CX and EX consulting firm with a human-centered, platform-agnostic approach to experience transformation. Their methodology emphasizes customer journey mapping, employee experience design, and organizational change management as interconnected disciplines. AI stance is relatively conservative—focusing on journey analytics rather than AI-native product features. Delivery model is pure management consulting (no platform implementation), serving large enterprises across banking, insurance, retail, and telecommunications in Spain and Latin America.

name: Izo
blog_profile: Izo positions as the leading CX consultancy across the Spanish-speaking world with Qualtrics-certified operations spanning 15+ markets in Latin America and Iberia. Their methodology combines Voice of Customer program design, CX maturity assessment, and digital experience optimization with strategic consulting. AI approach incorporates text analytics and sentiment analysis within VoC programs but is not positioned as AI-native. Delivery model blends Qualtrics platform implementation with CX strategy consulting, targeting banking, telecom, and retail enterprises across the Iberoamerican corridor.

name: Globant
blog_profile: Globant is a global technology services company with a Connected Experiences Studio dedicated to CX transformation at enterprise scale. Their methodology emphasizes technology-led experience design, combining UX engineering, data science, and AI to deliver connected customer journeys. AI stance is aggressively forward—positioning generative AI, AI agents, and AI engineering as core capabilities across all studios. Delivery model is large-scale technology implementation and managed services, competing more with systems integrators (Accenture, Wipro) than boutique CX consultancies. CX work is embedded within broader digital transformation engagements rather than sold as standalone programs.

name: GemSeek
blog_profile: GemSeek fue absorbida por Accenture Song. Su propuesta original era analytics de CX con foco en predicción de churn y modelado de lealtad — un enfoque data science-first dentro del espacio CX. Sin actividad independiente desde la adquisición.

name: Act XM
blog_profile: No verifiable information available. Unable to assess methodology, AI stance, or delivery model due to absence of digital presence. This entity may operate under a different name, be a newly formed consultancy not yet publicly launched, or may no longer be active.

name: Acceleration Strategy
blog_profile: Acceleration Strategy is a Canada/US-based Qualtrics partner specializing in experience management program strategy, implementation, and optimization. Their methodology focuses on AI-augmented experience orchestration—helping enterprises deploy Qualtrics AI agents, automated workflows, and predictive analytics within existing XM programs. AI stance is tightly coupled with Qualtrics' product roadmap, positioning as an early adopter and evangelist of Qualtrics AI capabilities. Delivery model combines Qualtrics technical implementation with strategic XM consulting, targeting mid-market and enterprise clients in financial services, healthcare, and government sectors across North America.
